title.en: But soon, many true monarchs lost interest in t...

content.en:
Subsequently, the Jiong of the Red Dragon Dojo opened the prohibitions of one building after another, allowing the True Monarchs and the Half-Step True Ancestors to enter without the slightest restriction.

Swish!!!

A true monarch went crazy and rushed towards those buildings as fast as he could, seeking a chance inside.

Seeing this scene, Luohai Zhenjun couldn't help it, where would he care about any conspiracy or not.

Moreover, a few half-step true ancestors thought that their strength was very strong, even if there were some conspiracies, a little attention would be enough to survive the tribulation.

In addition, for the sake of some chances, it is worth taking a risk, and you can't give up such a big opportunity because of inexplicable dangers and conspiracies!

When the dojo is opened, a large number of True Monarchs will soon arrive, so it is currently the only period when they have an advantage, so it is natural to get the benefits and opportunities as soon as possible.

Among them, most of the True Monarchs rushed to the Four Great Treasure Lands, namely the Martial Arts Arena, the Dao Law Pavilion, the Red Dragon Pool, and the Heavenly Soul Tree.

But soon, many true monarchs lost interest in the martial arts arena.

It's not that the martial arts arena is bad, but in fact, the martial arts arena has a great opportunity.

The martial arts arena is a huge cultivation square, if you practice in the martial arts arena, you can get a huge amplification, and you can also get some secret art inheritance from the void of the martial arts arena from time to time.

Moreover, the martial arts arena can calm people's minds, and there is almost no such thing as going crazy.

However, the benefits of the martial arts arena are continuous and long-term, and many true monarchs are now pursuing a great opportunity in a short period of time, so the martial arts arena is not beneficial to them.

If the future battlefield ruins were completely controlled by the Quasi-Dao Realm, then the martial arts arena would be enough to become an unimaginable treasure land.

But now, everyone has little interest in the martial arts arena.

And the three treasures of Dao Law Pavilion, Red Dragon Pond and Heavenly Soul Tree are really exciting.

The interior of the Dao Law Pavilion contains at least ten Dao Dao Inheritances, hundreds of True Ancestor Inheritances, and many secret art inheritances.

After entering the Dao Law Pavilion, everyone has a chance to obtain the inheritance, which is a chance to obtain the inheritance for free, and no contribution is required.

Contribution is a setting of the Red Dragon Dojo, and every disciple here has a contribution degree, which can be exchanged for inheritance, and even for the Great Dao Dao inheritance.

And if you enter the Dao Law Pavilion for the first time, you can only get one kind of inheritance at random, and as for what kind of inheritance you get, it depends on luck.

Ye Tian was also very interested in the inheritance of the Dao Law Pavilion, so he came here for the first time and entered the Dao Law Pavilion.

Rumble!!!

In the void of the Dao Law Pavilion inheritance, Ye Tian seemed to be standing under the dark starry sky, looking at the points of light in the void, and each of these points of light was a inheritance.

Under the investigation of the divine sense, it was impossible not to help but have something unusual, as if these points of light were exactly the same, so it was not clear what inheritance this point of light corresponded to.

"I hope that if I can obtain a Great Dao Dao Technique inheritance, then I will make too much money!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Dao Technique is a powerful technique that overrides the Origin Divine Power, and it is also the perfect combination of Dao and Dao power.

Strictly speaking, only Dao Ancestors could cultivate Dao Techniques, and True Ancestors had almost no way to obtain Dao Techniques.

Dao art is different from the origin supernatural power, it is a technique that can be passed on, but Dao art is too rare, ordinary Dao ancestors can't create a Dao technique, only the top Dao ancestor can be sure to create a Dao technique.

And the Dao art must be cultivated to the perfection realm before it can be inherited, otherwise it cannot be passed on to others at all.

However, Dao Techniques are inherently very advanced, and even if Dao Ancestors obtain Dao Techniques, they are not sure that they will cultivate them to the consummation realm, and most Dao Ancestors will master one or two Dao Techniques at most, and they can only cultivate them to the Xiaocheng realm.

As a result, a considerable number of new Dao Ancestors did not even have a Dao Technique inheritance, so they were unable to master Dao Arts.

Even the new Dao Ancestor doesn't have Dao skills, but let alone the True Ancestor!

At the very least, Ye Tian had never heard of any True Ancestor in the Void Heaven Sect who had obtained the Dao Technique, and even if he had obtained it secretly, if the True Ancestor wanted to practice the Dao Technique, it would be extremely difficult.

Because of this, the value of Taoism is great.

But the Dao Law Pavilion had a full ten Dao art inheritances, which simply shocked him.

It can be said that those top forces in the chaos are not as big as the Red Dragon Dojo!

Outside the realm of quasi-path.

The Dao Ancestors also learned that the Dao Technique Inheritance had appeared in the battlefield ruins, and many weak Dao Ancestors were excited.

These Dao Ancestors did not have Dao Inheritance, but the battlefield relics had so many Dao Inheritance, once they obtained one or more Dao Inheritance, their strength could increase significantly.

Therefore, they were excited, and they were eager to immediately enter the battlefield ruins.

On the other hand, the top Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, although he also wanted to obtain some Dao Inheritance to increase the foundation of his own strength, he did not have much interest in Dao Inheritance.

After all, they had all cultivated Dao techniques, and there was more than one of them, and they had not yet fully understood the Dao techniques they had cultivated, so they were naturally not interested in cultivating other Dao techniques at the same time.

It has to be said that with the passage of time, more and more inheritances will appear, and the value of battlefield relics far exceeds their imagination.

Once the opportunity to completely exploit the battlefield relics, the strength of the major forces will usher in a period of skyrocketing.

-------------

Ye Tian didn't study too much, grabbed a point of light casually, and obtained a inheritance.

"True Ancestor Inheritance!"

Ye Tian sensed it and said with a smile.

Although it is not a Dao inheritance, it is very good to be able to obtain the true ancestor inheritance.

He even suspected that the free opportunity would not be able to obtain the Dao Inheritance, otherwise the Dao Inheritance would be too easy to obtain.

In his opinion, if you want to obtain the inheritance of Taoism, you need to join the Red Dragon Dojo and get a massive amount of contribution, then there is hope.

And with the destruction of the Red Dragon Dojo, this route will definitely not work, then the only way is to break through the Dao Law Pavilion and forcibly obtain the Dao Inheritance, but in that case, it is undoubtedly looking for death!

The inheritance of the true ancestor obtained by Ye Tian is not bad, it is the inheritance of the true ancestor in the late stage of the Great Dao, containing various secret techniques and cultivation techniques of the other party, which has a great reference for Ye Tian, and if it is placed in the human race, it is enough to serve as one of the strongest foundations of the human race.

Next, Ye Tian came to the Heavenly Soul Tree.

The Heavenly Soul Tree is a place of great opportunity in the Red Dragon Dojo, the Heavenly Soul Tree is a treasure tree, growing as many as 100,000 Heavenly Soul Holy Fruits, each Heavenly Soul Holy Fruit is protected by prohibition, and each person can obtain a Heavenly Soul Holy Fruit.

The Heavenly Soul Sacred Fruit can raise a person's comprehension to a terrifying level for a period of time, and the Divine Soul will experience the feeling of the passage of time through eternity, and will be able to spend ten thousand years in a short period of time.

Therefore, taking a Heavenly Soul Holy Fruit can cultivate supernatural powers or secret arts, and you can easily master a secret technique.

It's a pity that the Heavenly Soul Holy Fruit can only be taken once in a lifetime, and if you take more, it will be useless.

Ye Tian came to the Heavenly Soul Tree and snatched a Heavenly Soul Fruit, he was going to use this Heavenly Soul Fruit to cultivate the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, so as to become the real Black Wind Mountain Reserve Peak Master.
